response:
{
            "$return": "Daily return of the stock on that day.",
            "TS_MEAN($return, 5)": "Mean of daily returns over the past 5 days.",
            "$volume": "Volume of the stock on that day.",
            "TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 20)": "Percentage change in volume over the past 20 days.",
            "ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 5), 20)": "Z-score of 5-day momentum over 20 days.",
            "ZSCORE(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 20), 20)": "Z-score of 20-day volume growth over 20 days."
        }

parsed.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day.
parsed.TS_MEAN($return, 5): Mean of daily returns over the past 5 days.
parsed.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day.
parsed.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 20): Percentage change in volume over the past 20 days.
parsed.ZSCORE(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 20), 20): Z-score of 20-day volume growth over 20 days.
